decisions.briefing: Neutral session with a slight tech/broad divergence — NASDAQ slipped 0.3% while the S&P edged up 0.2%, suggesting mild rotation out of growth and into value/cyclicals. Portfolio sits at +30% overall with 3 open slots, but cash is only $298 — well below the $500 threshold required to open a new position. Top candidate BEAM (score 100, volume surge) is compelling but unreachable today. Holding all seven positions and waiting for cash to accumulate via profit-target sells before deploying into new names.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities delivered a split verdict on June 4, with the S&P 500 eking out a +0.2% gain while the NASDAQ slipped 0.3%, reflecting modest selling pressure in large-cap technology names. The divergence suggests investors rotated modestly toward defensive and value sectors rather than outright risk-off, keeping the broader index in positive territory. No major macro catalysts drove the session; the move appears to be routine consolidation after recent gains.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股6月4日走勢分歧，標普500指數微漲0.2%，那斯達克則小幅下滑0.3%，反映大型科技股承壓、資金輪動至防禦與價值板塊的格局。整體氣氛偏向觀望，並非全面避險，因此大盤得以維持正報酬。本次盤面欠缺重大宏觀催化劑，主要為近期漲勢後的正常整固。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Dry powder refers to uninvested cash held in reserve so a portfolio can act quickly when a high-conviction opportunity appears. Today the portfolio has three open slots and a top-scored candidate (BEAM, score 100 with a volume surge) but only $298 in cash — too little to size a meaningful position. This illustrates why keeping some cash on hand matters: without it, even the best setups are unreachable.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「乾火藥」（Dry Powder）指投資組合中預留的閒置現金，目的是在高確信度機會出現時能迅速行動。今日組合有三個空缺部位，且評分最高的候選股BEAM（滿分100、出現成交量激增）已浮現，但帳戶現金僅餘298美元，不足以建立具意義的倉位。這正說明保留適量現金的重要性——若手邊沒有子彈，再好的進場訊號也無從把握。
